gettingStarted.description: Step-by-step tutorials to configure your account, connect routers, and start operating.

billingPayments.description: Resolve questions about invoices, payment methods, recurring charges, and account status.

notifications.title: Notifications
notifications.description: Configure automatic alerts, message templates, and communication channels.

contactSupport.description: Can't find what you're looking for? Open a ticket or chat with an agent in real time.

search.title: Search your question

explore.title: Explore the categories
explore.description: Browse sections organized by topic: payments, network, clients, billing, and more.

contact.title: Contact the team
contact.description: If you need personalized help, open a ticket or live chat with an advisor.

directHelp.title: Need direct help?
directHelp.subtitle: Our support team is ready to assist you. Average response under 2 hours during business hours.

ctaSection.title: Still have questions?
